infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to find nearby mechanics and auto-fill your address.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We need your location to track your mechanic in real time.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is needed for capturing photos of the vehicle condition.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is needed for voice messages in the in‑app chat.
